---
title: "References — Tissue injury"
---

Domain-specific reading list on tissue injury: mechanisms, repair, pathology, computational modelling.

## Suggested topics

A starting list of reading areas. Specific citations to be added over time.

- Damage-associated molecular patterns (DAMPs) and sterile inflammation.
- Tissue regeneration versus fibrotic repair.
- Histopathology scoring systems and inter-rater variability.
- Spatial transcriptomics in injury contexts.
- Computational models of wound healing and repair dynamics.

See the [disclaimer](index.qmd#disclaimer) — this is a starting list, not a curated bibliography.
